meaning: adj.多党的,包括多党的,包含多党党员的 导致多党并存的选举(或政治)制度的
examples: Voters turned out in force for their first taste of multiparty elections.
The Pentagon does not want to own those lands but organize multiparty partnerships.
He went on to join Mr Chiluba in setting up the Movement for Multiparty Democracy.
Asked if Laos would embrace multiparty democracy, Khamtay insists the people want one party.
